title: Multimodality Multimask and Multitask Auto-Segmentation Network for Organs-at-Risk in Head and Neck Radiation Therapy.
abstract: Accurate segmentation of head and neck organs-at-risk remains a critical challenge in radiation therapy planning, where current single-modality approaches often fail to address the inherent complexity of soft-tissue differentiation and interpatient anatomic variations. This study aims to develop a clinically robust auto-segmentation framework that synergistically integrates multimodal imaging features while optimizing computational efficiency.
